topStories.title: US responsible for deadly attack on Iranian school: Amnesty International
topStories.description: Rights group says Tomahawk missile likely used in Minab school strike that killed at least 170 people, mostly children.

topStories.title: Will Powell Cut Interest Rates? Trump Again Targets Fed Chair, Praises Kevin Warsh
topStories.description: The US President argued that the economic environment warrants immediate action by the central bank.

dailyNews.title: Fuse raises $25M  to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by U.S. credit unions
dailyNews.description: The startup also announced a $5M 'rescue fund' to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.

dailyNews.title: BBC Asks Judge To Dismiss Trump $10 Billion Defamation Suit
dailyNews.description: Altman previously said Trump's suit against the BBC will go to trial in February 2027 if it isn't tossed out.

dailyNews.title: Bank of America settles lawsuit with Epstein accuser, avoids trial — Details
dailyNews.description: Judge Rakoff ruled BofA must face claims of benefiting from Epstein's trafficking. The woman's lawyers have settled with JPMorgan and Deutsche Bank for $290 million and $75 million, respectively.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court says stakeholder consultation needed, reluctant to alter duration of five-year law courses
dailyNews.description: While acknowledging that reforms in legal education are a necessity, the Chief Justice-led Bench says it may not be appropriate for courts to determine the duration of professional courses.

dailyNews.title: Civilians pulled from rubble after US-Israeli strikes on Tehran
dailyNews.description: Rescuers have pulled civilians from the rubble after a new wave of US-Israeli strikes targeted Tehran.

dailyNews.title: Haryana Rajya Sabha Polls: Voting Secrecy Row Delays Counting
dailyNews.description: A controversy over the secrecy of votes has delayed the counting process in the Haryana Rajya Sabha Election, with complaints filed by both the Congress and the BJ against each other's MLAs.

dailyNews.title: Trump says White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles diagnosed with early-stage breast cancer
dailyNews.description: According to Trump, Wiles has assembled a strong medical team and her outlook remains positive. He said doctors expect a good recovery.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Predicted 9/11 A Year Before It Happened: Here's The Truth
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday said he had warned about the September 11 terror attacks more than a year before they took place.

dailyNews.title: Trump Calls Iran Paper Tiger, Says Countries Dependent On Strait of Hormuz Must Help US
dailyNews.description: Trump claimed that multiple countries are helping secure the Strait of Hormuz, the key waterway, but doesn't want their names revealed to avoid Iranian retaliation.

dailyNews.title: Trump laughs aloud after intel briefing claims Iran’s new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei may be gay: Report
dailyNews.description: As political tensions continue, the allegations surrounding Mojtaba Khamenei’s personal life remain unverified publicly and largely confined to intelligence assessments, according to a report.

dailyNews.title: US responsible for deadly attack on Iranian school: Amnesty International
dailyNews.description: Rights group says Tomahawk missile likely used in Minab school strike that killed at least 170 people, mostly children.

dailyNews.title: Will Powell Cut Interest Rates? Trump Again Targets Fed Chair, Praises Kevin Warsh
dailyNews.description: The US President argued that the economic environment warrants immediate action by the central bank.

dailyNews.title: Where Is Mojtaba Khamenei? Iran Minister Shares Big Update With NDTV
dailyNews.description: As the war between Iran, the United States and Israel enters its third week, questions have continued to circulate about the status of Iran's Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei.

dailyNews.title: US forces obliterated Iran, air force and navy gone: Donald Trump
dailyNews.description: US forces obliterated Iran air force and navy gone Donald Trump

dailyNews.title: Trinamool Congress To Contest Assam Polls Independently
dailyNews.description: With the announcement of elections in Assam and several other states, the Trinamool Congress (TMC) has said it will largely contest the upcoming polls in Assam independently.

dailyNews.title: Who is Seth Chambers, ex-Marine Intel analyst indicted for leaking classified US defense information to China?
dailyNews.description: A former Marine Intelligence analyst from Texas County, Missouri, was indicted for transmitting national defense information. He allegedly shared classified documents with individuals in Maryland and China. The charges are allegations pending evidence presentation in a federal trial.

dailyNews.title: US, Israel now know ‘what kind of nation they are dealing with’
dailyNews.description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says his country has shown it is ready to take the war “as far as necessary".

dailyNews.title: Shopify is preparing for AI shopping agents to change everything, exec says
dailyNews.description: Shopify is preparing for an ecommerce transformation via AI shopping agents, says president Harley Finklestein.

dailyNews.title: Is Russia benefitting from the Iran war?
dailyNews.description: The US is allowing the purchase of Russian oil that’s stranded at sea after the war on Iran led to higher energy prices.

dailyNews.title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
dailyNews.description: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war isn't really an option.

dailyNews.title: MEA clarifies India hasn't engaged in bilateral talks with US amid Trump's call to deploy warships to Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: India clarified that it has not engaged in bilateral talks with the US about ensuring safe passage for merchant ships through the Strait of Hormuz. The statement follows US President Trump's calls for nations to deploy warships to keep the crucial maritime corridor open.

dailyNews.title: Iran officials tout ‘Trump-burning’ celebration amid battle of narratives
dailyNews.description: Iranian state media calls for turning fire festival into a symbolic protest by burning figures of Trump and Netanyahu.

dailyNews.title: EU leaders reject military involvement in Strait of Hormuz amid war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Pushback comes as US President Donald Trump says NATO allies should help secure key waterway amid soaring oil prices.

dailyNews.title: One of USA's largest meatpacking plants goes on strike: 3,800 workers walk out, allege unfair labour practices — Details
dailyNews.description: Around 3,800 workers at Swift Beef Co. in Colorado initiated a strike, marking the first walkout at a U.S. beef slaughterhouse since the 1980s. Union officials allege unfair labor practices by JBS USA amid contract negotiations as beef prices rise amidst a low U.S. cattle population.

dailyNews.title: No talks with US on warship deployment in Hormuz: India on Trump's global appeal
dailyNews.description: No talks with US on warship deployment in Hormuz India on Trumps global appeal

dailyNews.title: Trump 'thrilled' as FCC chair warns news organizations to correct course or lose licenses
dailyNews.description: Trump expresses support as FCC Chairman Brendan Carr calls for investigation into news organizations' broadcast licenses over alleged fake news coverage.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel's Trump, Melania digs at Oscars 'fell flat' with critics
dailyNews.description: Jimmy Kimmel faced backlash over his Oscars jokes targeting President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump, with a White House official calling the comedian a "classless hack."

dailyNews.title: Trump-aligned law group urges Jim Jordan to probe 'nationwide pattern' of blue-state ‘lawfare’
dailyNews.description: A Trump-aligned legal group claims Democratic-run states are filing frivolous lawsuits to block the president's agenda without proof of injury.

dailyNews.title: WH chief of staff Susie Wiles diagnosed with early stage breast cancer, prognosis 'excellent,' Trump says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump issued a Truth Social post on Monday announcing that his White House chief of staff Susie Wiles had received an early stage breast cancer diagnosis.

dailyNews.title: Trump scolds reporter as 'very obnoxious' over question on Air Force One, blasts 'most corrupt' ABC News
dailyNews.description: Trump scolded "a very obnoxious" reporter who attempted to ask about sending troops to the Middle East as part of the war with Iran and blasted ABC News as "corrupt" on Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin official says there’s a 'very good chance' gas prices will be back to normal by summer
dailyNews.description: Department of Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Iran conflict will cause short-term gas price increases, but predicts normal prices by summer as Operation Epic Fury continues.

dailyNews.title: Rand Paul floats possible 2028 run, pushes back on Trump-era protectionism
dailyNews.description: Sen. Rand Paul considers 2028 presidential run, saying he'll decide after 2026 midterms while advocating for free market policies in Trump-dominated Republican Party.

dailyNews.title: Europe Rejects Trump’s Demands for Warships to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: While some European countries said they were discussing ways to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, several rejected President Trump’s calls to send warships.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Threat to Delay Summit With Xi Casts New Shadow Over China Relations
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned that he could postpone a meeting set to begin in just over two weeks if China refuses to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: With Iran War, Trump Risks Stepping on Gains From His Own Tax Cuts
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s war in Iran has raised some costs just as many Americans are starting to see savings from last year’s tax cuts.

dailyNews.title: Why Republicans are Changing Course on Immigration
dailyNews.description: What did Speaker Mike Johnson mean when he talked about a “course correction” in the Trump administration’s deportation approach? Our White House correspondent Zolan Kanno-Youngs analyzes how the message around deportation is changing.
